privileged_info_summary: The name 'Rebecca Fleming' is verified to exist in the Kaggle Customer Support Ticket Dataset (Ticket ID 6 in the chiapudding/kaggle-customer-service dataset). However, the email address 'rebecca.fleming@helpdesk.local' is NOT from the dataset; the actual Rebecca Fleming in the dataset has the email 'sheenasmith@example.com'. The task claims the name comes from Kaggle, which is partially true, but the email is synthetic and appears to be fabricated specifically for this FreeScout task.
